title: carlina × balfouris
intro: Carlina × balfouris, also known as the Balfour's carline thistle, is a rare hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Carlina acaulis and Carlina vulgaris. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carlina × balfouris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
